system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Endurance
Type: Normal
Qi: 1

You draw on your inner strength and flow your Qi into a person whose power has been depleted. On a Success this temporarily restores 1 point of Qi per Rank of Neigong to a target who has been drained or depleted. On a Total Success it restores one additional point of Qi. The effect lasts one hour. For every point you restore, you temporarily lose 1 point of your own Qi for an hour. It does not work when poison is the source of a person’s Qi loss. This takes ten minutes to perform. Cathartic: This restores 2 levels of Qi per Rank of Neigong. The effect is permanent, but depletes your own Qi by the same amount for one day per level of Qi restored.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.consequenceNote: Restored Qi temporarily depletes the user's own Qi by the same amount; Cathartic restoration depletes it for one day per level restored.
system.catharticEffect: This restores 2 levels of Qi per Rank of Neigong. The effect is permanent, but depletes your own Qi by the same amount for one day per level of Qi restored.
